title: Rum Punch Fest — Reggae on the Rooftop (4th of July Weekend)
description: Independence Day reggae rooftop with rum punch and skyline views. Fireworks + Caribbean food + dancing = the loudest, easiest 4th-of-July date in town.

title: Wednesday Jazz Jam w/ the Gordon Vernick Quartet
description: Listening-room jazz jam in a candlelit Midtown room. The kind of midweek date that feels grown-up without trying too hard.

title: Latin Wednesdays at Tongue & Groove
description: Weekly Latin social — salsa, bachata, reggaetón under the Buckhead lights. Built for couples who want a midweek dance date.

title: First Friday at First "LIVE" — Rod Harris, Jr.
description: Intimate live-jazz series — sax-led trio in a small room. Wine in, conversation starter, new favorite song out.

title: Afrobeats to the World — Atlanta
description: 18+ Afrobeats party night — DJs, dancefloor, international crowd. Late, loud, and exactly the 'wear something cute, lose your voice' kind of Friday.

title: NE-YO & AKON — Nights Like This Tour 2026
description: R&B double-headliner at Lakewood — sing-along setlist from start to finish. Pre-show dinner on the Southside, then lose your voice together.

title: Styx & Chicago — The Windy Cities Tour
description: Classic-rock double-bill under the stars in Alpharetta. Patio-dinner-then-amphitheatre date — 'name that song' the whole drive home.

title: Lionel Richie & Earth, Wind & Fire — Sing a Song All Night Long
description: Legacy-pop doubleheader — every song is a sing-along. Walk from a downtown dinner to the arena and dance the night away.

title: Margaritaville Presents Jimmy Buffett's Coral Reefer Band
location: Synovus Bank Amphitheater at Chastain Park, Atlanta, GA
description: Chastain Park picnic-concert date — blanket, wine, cheese, parrotheads. The most romantic Friday-night-in-Atlanta formula.

title: Phillippia & Yoshi — R&B Singers at Perfect Note Atlanta
description: Intimate R&B dinner-and-a-show setting. Easy date formula — order dinner, sit close, listen to great vocals.

title: WHINE CUP 2026 — Free Entry + Rum Punch til 11 PM
description: Dancehall + soca + Afrobeats rooftop party. Free entry with RSVP, rum punch until 11 — the lowest-effort, highest-fun Saturday in Atlanta.

title: Atlanta's Afro Caribbean Fest
description: 21+ indoor + outdoor Afrobeats, reggae and R&B day party. Daylight dancefloor date — home before midnight, no regrets.

title: Believe the Hype Saturdays @ Panache ATL
description: Atlanta's hottest Afrobeats lounge — full rotation Saturdays in Marietta. Late-night dress-up, dance-til-close date.

title: Summer Slamajama — Summer Gallery Opening
location: Anne Irwin Fine Art, Atlanta, GA
description: Summer gallery opening with fresh art, light bites and conversation. Walkable, browsable, easy 'first real date' that doesn't try too hard.

title: GVE Rooftop Art Gala
location: 800 Rankin St NE, Midtown Atlanta, GA
description: Two-day curated rooftop art gala showcasing work to collectors in Midtown. Wine, skyline, and 'which one would we put above the couch?' conversations.

title: ATL Vegan Festival
description: Plant-based festival in Piedmont Park — six hours of vegan food stalls, demos and shopping. Picnic-blanket date that ends with full bellies and new favorite spots.

title: Life Space Vegan Chef Cook-Off
location: 294 Hamilton E Holmes Dr NW, Atlanta, GA
description: Live vegan chef cook-off — watch, taste, vote. Built for foodie couples who like a little friendly competition on a date.

title: Pizza for the Animals! @ Pizza Verdura Sincera
description: Vegetarian pizza night benefiting an animal sanctuary. Cheap, casual, do-good date — pizza + a story to tell.

title: Elevated Vegan Tasting — Conscious & Curious
description: Curated plant-based tasting menu in Conyers. Road-trip-with-purpose date — Sunday drive, sit-down tasting, back home by evening.

title: Helium Comedy — Na'im Lynn
location: Helium Comedy Club, 10 North Hwy N, Alpharetta, GA
description: Storytelling-style stand-up with bite. Easy 'I just need to make us laugh' date — dinner in Alpharetta, then the club.

title: Helium Comedy — Karlous Miller
location: Helium Comedy Club, 10 North Hwy N, Alpharetta, GA
description: Karlous Miller (85 South, Wild 'N Out) live — high-energy, riff-heavy comedy. Big laugh date, perfect warm-up for a late dinner.

title: Helium Comedy — James "Murr" Murray
location: Helium Comedy Club, 10 North Hwy N, Alpharetta, GA
description: Impractical Jokers' Murr on stage — confessional storytelling from the show's 'punished' one. Date that turns into quote material for weeks.

title: Helium Comedy — Bubba Dub
location: Helium Comedy Club, 10 North Hwy N, Alpharetta, GA
description: Sunday-night laughs with Bubba Dub. Low-key weeknight reset date — dinner in Alpharetta, then home not too late.

title: HANGEO Thursdays — Salsa & Bachata Night
description: Salsa + bachata social with DJs and a welcoming floor. Beginner-friendly enough to learn together, fun enough to come back.

title: La Placita — Dancing Under the Stars
description: Tropical outdoor social — bring a date, bring your dancing shoes. Easy Sunday date that feels like a mini-vacation.

title: PASOFINO Dance Social
description: Jose Maldonado's PASOFINO social — late-night Latin dancefloor for couples who already know they like to dance.

title: Salsa at Politan Row — Colony Square
location: Politan Row at Colony Square, Midtown Atlanta, GA
description: Salsa + bachata Sunday afternoon at Politan Row. Food-hall + dancefloor combo — eat first, dance after, walk it off in Midtown.

title: Viernes Tropicales — Latin Night at Sanctuary
description: Tropical-themed Friday Latin night — dress up, dance late. Couples who want a Friday with energy and a DJ.

title: Fresh Pasta 101 Cooking Class
description: Hands-on pasta-making class — make, eat, take home the skill. Built-for-two activity date with leftovers.

title: Make Your Own Sushi Cooking Class
description: Sushi-rolling date with Chef Bryan — learn together, eat what you roll. The 'do something' date that ends in dinner.

title: Glow Nights After Hours — Georgia Aquarium
description: After-hours aquarium with cocktails, DJs and glowing tanks. The 'show off Atlanta to an out-of-towner' date — or just feel like kids again together.

title: Rhythm & Roots — JazzyEats Supper Club
description: Live jazz + curated supper-club menu — sit-down, multi-course, music built in. Date that requires zero planning after you book.

title: Cocktails in the Garden — Atlanta Botanical Garden
description: Golden-hour cocktails among the summer plantings. The walk-and-talk, picture-take, slow-down date that always works.

title: Dexter Tolson & Friends at Vibes Jazz Cafe (Red Door)
location: Vibes Jazz Cafe at The Red Door, Atlanta, GA
description: Local jazz legend in an intimate room — the 'we just discovered our new spot' kind of Friday night date.

title: Saxophonist Jessy J at Perfect Note Atlanta
description: Contemporary jazz saxophonist in a dinner-and-a-show setting. Easy date formula — order dinner, sit close, listen together.

title: Andrew Dosunmu — 'The African Game' at ADAMA
description: Photography exhibition from Andrew Dosunmu at ADAMA. Quiet, conversation-rich art date — give yourselves an hour, then dinner.
